page: Google Cloud Platform c4-highcpu-16 is an x86_64 compute-optimized server powered by an Intel Xeon 8581C processor. The instance is configured with 16 dedicated vCPUs, which correspond to 8 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, operating at a base frequency of 2.3 GHz. It features a 260 MB L3 cache and is equipped with 32 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. This configuration does not include any bundled local storage or GPU accelerators, focusing its resource profile entirely on CPU-bound execution.

In benchmark evaluations, the c4-highcpu-16 demonstrates top-tier single-core performance. It achieves a Geekbench single-core score of 2314.0 and shows high efficiency in single-threaded operations, such as gzip compression at 34.81 GB/sec and bzip3 decompression at 14.9 GB/sec. Multi-core performance metrics, including a stress-ng multi-core score of 17354.28 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 13758.0, position the server in the average tier relative to its hardware class. The processor supports advanced instruction sets, including Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions and AVX-512, which facilitate efficient vector and matrix operations. This is reflected in its text generation speed of 336.56 tokens/sec for small-scale language models.

The qualitative cost efficiency of the c4-highcpu-16 is defined by its compute-to-memory ratio. By minimizing memory overhead and omitting local storage, the instance provides a streamlined hardware profile for workloads that require high CPU throughput without massive memory footprints. This makes the server highly suitable for web serving, software compilation, text processing, and lightweight CPU-based machine learning inference.
description: Google Cloud Platform c4-highcpu-16 is an x86_64 compute-optimized server powered by an Intel Xeon 8581C processor. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs, 32 GB of RAM, and no bundled local storage or GPUs. The instance delivers top-tier single-core performance, highlighted by a Geekbench single-core score of 2314.0 and fast single-threaded compression speeds. Supported by Intel AMX and AVX-512, it is well-suited for web serving, software compilation, and lightweight inference.

tagline: A compute-optimized x86_64 server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors, delivering top-tier single-threaded performance for CPU-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by an Intel Xeon 8581C processor with 16 dedicated vCPUs and 32 GB RAM.
Delivers top-tier single-core performance in Geekbench and text processing benchmarks.
Equipped with Intel AMX and AVX-512 instruction sets for accelerated matrix math.
Contains no bundled local storage or GPUs, optimizing the profile for pure compute tasks.
Best suited for web serving, software compilation, and lightweight LLM inference.
